This page requires JavaScript to display.
Unpacking...
so the DOCTYPE stays first; prepending the script // would push the parser into quirks mode. DOMParser always emits a // (synthesizing one if the source HTML omitted it) but may carry // attributes through, so match the full opening tag. slice() rather than // replace() keeps us clear of $-pattern substitution in resourceScript. const headOpen = template.match(/]*>/i); if (headOpen) { const i = headOpen.index + headOpen[0].length; template = template.slice(0, i) + resourceScript + template.slice(i); } // Parse the template and swap the root element. Scripts inserted via // DOMParser/replaceWith are inert per spec — re-create each with // createElement so they execute, awaiting onload for src scripts to // preserve ordering (React before ReactDOM before Babel before text/babel). const doc = new DOMParser().parseFromString(template, 'text/html'); document.documentElement.replaceWith(doc.documentElement); const dead = Array.from(document.scripts); for (const old of dead) { const s = document.createElement('script'); for (const a of old.attributes) s.setAttribute(a.name, a.value); s.textContent = old.textContent; // text/babel scripts with a src: fetch and inline. transformScriptTags // does XHR against the src, but blob:null/ from a file:// origin is // silently dropped. Inlining makes it a plain inline babel script, // which transformScriptTags handles unconditionally. if ((s.type === 'text/babel' || s.type === 'text/jsx') && s.src) { const r = await fetch(s.src); s.textContent = await r.text(); s.removeAttribute('src'); } const p = s.src ? new Promise(function(r) { s.onload = s.onerror = r; }) : null; old.replaceWith(s); if (p) await p; } // Babel standalone auto-transforms type=text/babel on DOMContentLoaded, // which fired before we swapped the document. Trigger manually if present. if (window.Babel && typeof window.Babel.transformScriptTags === 'function') { window.Babel.transformScriptTags(); } } catch (err) { setStatus('Error unpacking: ' + err.message); console.error('Bundle unpack error:', err); } }); \n \n \n The Catalogue — Powerlifting Programs<\u002Ftitle>\n\n <link rel=\"preconnect\" href=\"https://fonts.googleapis.com\">\n <link rel=\"preconnect\" href=\"https://fonts.gstatic.com\" crossorigin=\"\">\n <style>/* vietnamese */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'Big Shoulders Display';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 500;\n src: url(\"f98bd0b7-5723-48d8-8c91-287eb2b9cb22\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'Instrument Serif';\n font-style: italic;\n font-weight: 400;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"375746a4-d6e1-4f8e-a227-242592ebd59e\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'Instrument Serif';\n font-style: italic;\n font-weight: 400;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"467a5b8f-5a15-4326-8e5a-6db691f19b9c\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'Instrument Serif';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 400;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"f5b5b0a1-69a0-48d4-85c9-a89a8819db08\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'Instrument Serif';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 400;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"a0ce0624-43fd-406e-a3cf-011310505670\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* cyrillic-ext */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 400;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"5450b8a8-df54-4909-b8c5-0f1e81a6f44a\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0460-052F, U+1C80-1C8A, U+20B4, U+2DE0-2DFF, U+A640-A69F, U+FE2E-FE2F;\n}\n/* cyrillic */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 400;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"f02faabc-44e1-4717-8eab-a01c671d2f13\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0301, U+0400-045F, U+0490-0491, U+04B0-04B1, U+2116;\n}\n/* greek */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 400;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"e7be5060-25e3-43de-82c1-69438e42f289\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0370-0377, U+037A-037F, U+0384-038A, U+038C, U+038E-03A1, U+03A3-03FF;\n}\n/* vietnamese */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 400;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"77e254ad-d51c-40e6-a8ad-b6bcd33a7f54\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0102-0103, U+0110-0111, U+0128-0129, U+0168-0169, U+01A0-01A1, U+01AF-01B0, U+0300-0301, U+0303-0304, U+0308-0309, U+0323, U+0329, U+1EA0-1EF9, U+20AB;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 400;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"46ab13bf-7ff4-4173-b94f-7045c81c170b\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 400;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"c4044aea-cfc2-45a1-97d8-e877879c6fdc\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* cyrillic-ext */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 500;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"5450b8a8-df54-4909-b8c5-0f1e81a6f44a\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0460-052F, U+1C80-1C8A, U+20B4, U+2DE0-2DFF, U+A640-A69F, U+FE2E-FE2F;\n}\n/* cyrillic */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 500;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"f02faabc-44e1-4717-8eab-a01c671d2f13\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0301, U+0400-045F, U+0490-0491, U+04B0-04B1, U+2116;\n}\n/* greek */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 500;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"e7be5060-25e3-43de-82c1-69438e42f289\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0370-0377, U+037A-037F, U+0384-038A, U+038C, U+038E-03A1, U+03A3-03FF;\n}\n/* vietnamese */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 500;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"77e254ad-d51c-40e6-a8ad-b6bcd33a7f54\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0102-0103, U+0110-0111, U+0128-0129, U+0168-0169, U+01A0-01A1, U+01AF-01B0, U+0300-0301, U+0303-0304, U+0308-0309, U+0323, U+0329, U+1EA0-1EF9, U+20AB;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 500;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"46ab13bf-7ff4-4173-b94f-7045c81c170b\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 500;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"c4044aea-cfc2-45a1-97d8-e877879c6fdc\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* vietnamese */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'Newsreader';\n font-style: italic;\n font-weight: 400;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"4ee56af1-5574-45e4-9122-3a92fd13f377\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0102-0103, U+0110-0111, U+0128-0129, U+0168-0169, U+01A0-01A1, U+01AF-01B0, U+0300-0301, U+0303-0304, U+0308-0309, U+0323, U+0329, U+1EA0-1EF9, U+20AB;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'Newsreader';\n font-style: italic;\n font-weight: 400;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"41205f76-1a77-4d38-9848-838bdb767a53\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'Newsreader';\n font-style: italic;\n font-weight: 400;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"20619809-d644-413b-a3d7-e784cfca294e\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* vietnamese */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'Newsreader';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 400;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"c1c172d7-45db-463c-9331-5cab2256da43\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0102-0103, U+0110-0111, U+0128-0129, U+0168-0169, U+01A0-01A1, U+01AF-01B0, U+0300-0301, U+0303-0304, U+0308-0309, U+0323, U+0329, U+1EA0-1EF9, U+20AB;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'Newsreader';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 400;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"8270ef69-d18f-4a25-8990-66eacc23e43b\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'Newsreader';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 400;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"b39ce165-bb98-420a-ba52-da0ad9aedabf\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n/* vietnamese */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'Newsreader';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 500;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"c1c172d7-45db-463c-9331-5cab2256da43\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0102-0103, U+0110-0111, U+0128-0129, U+0168-0169, U+01A0-01A1, U+01AF-01B0, U+0300-0301, U+0303-0304, U+0308-0309, U+0323, U+0329, U+1EA0-1EF9, U+20AB;\n}\n/* latin-ext */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'Newsreader';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 500;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"8270ef69-d18f-4a25-8990-66eacc23e43b\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0100-02BA, U+02BD-02C5, U+02C7-02CC, U+02CE-02D7, U+02DD-02FF, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+1D00-1DBF, U+1E00-1E9F, U+1EF2-1EFF, U+2020, U+20A0-20AB, U+20AD-20C0, U+2113, U+2C60-2C7F, U+A720-A7FF;\n}\n/* latin */\n@font-face {\n font-family: 'Newsreader';\n font-style: normal;\n font-weight: 500;\n font-display: swap;\n src: url(\"b39ce165-bb98-420a-ba52-da0ad9aedabf\") format('woff2');\n unicode-range: U+0000-00FF, U+0131, U+0152-0153, U+02BB-02BC, U+02C6, U+02DA, U+02DC, U+0304, U+0308, U+0329, U+2000-206F, U+20AC, U+2122, U+2191, U+2193, U+2212, U+2215, U+FEFF, U+FFFD;\n}\n<\u002Fstyle>\n\n <style>/* The Catalogue — Powerlifting Programs */\n\n:root {\n /* Default palette: Bone — heavier ink, gym-floor feel */\n --paper: #ebe7dc;\n --paper-2: #e0dbcc;\n --paper-3: #d2ccb6;\n --ink: #0e0e0c;\n --ink-2: #2a2924;\n --ink-3: #5e5b51;\n --ink-4: #8d8775;\n --rule: #b8b1a0;\n --rule-soft: #cdc6b3;\n --accent: #8a1c1d; /* deep oxblood */\n --accent-ink: #f4eada;\n --good: #2a4d2a;\n --warn: #8a6a1a;\n\n --font-display: \"Instrument Serif\", \"Cormorant\", \"Times New Roman\", serif;\n --font-stencil: \"Big Shoulders Display\", \"Oswald\", \"Impact\", sans-serif;\n --font-body: \"Geist\", \"Söhne\", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;\n --font-mono: \"JetBrains Mono\", \"IBM Plex Mono\", ui-monospace, monospace;\n\n --density: 1;\n --radius: 2px;\n}\n\n[data-palette=\"graphite\"] {\n --paper: #1c1b18;\n --paper-2: #232220;\n --paper-3: #2c2a26;\n --ink: #efece4;\n --ink-2: #d4d0c4;\n --ink-3: #918d80;\n --ink-4: #5e5b51;\n --rule: #3a3833;\n --rule-soft: #2c2a26;\n --accent: #d97a4a;\n --accent-ink: #1c1b18;\n}\n\n[data-palette=\"lab\"] {\n --paper: #f7f7f4;\n --paper-2: #ededea;\n --paper-3: #e2e2dd;\n --ink: #0e0e0c;\n --ink-2: #2a2a26;\n --ink-3: #6e6e68;\n --ink-4: #a4a49d;\n --rule: #d6d6d0;\n --rule-soft: #e6e6e0;\n --accent: #1d3a8a;\n}\n\n[data-density=\"compact\"] { --density: 0.78; }\n[data-density=\"roomy\"] { --density: 1.18; }\n\n* { box-sizing: border-box; }\nhtml, body { margin: 0; padding: 0; }\nhtml { background: var(--paper); }\n\nbody {\n font-family: var(--font-body);\n background: var(--paper);\n color: var(--ink);\n font-size: 15px;\n line-height: 1.5;\n -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;\n font-feature-settings: \"ss01\", \"cv11\", \"tnum\" 0;\n min-height: 100vh;\n overflow-x: hidden;\n}\n\n#root { min-height: 100vh; }\n\n/* ----- Typographic primitives ----- */\n.display {\n font-family: var(--font-display);\n font-weight: 400;\n letter-spacing: -0.012em;\n line-height: 0.92;\n}\n.italic { font-style: italic; }\n.eyebrow {\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n text-transform: uppercase;\n font-size: 11px;\n letter-spacing: 0.12em;\n color: var(--ink-3);\n}\n.mono { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-feature-settings: \"tnum\"; }\n.num { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-feature-settings: \"tnum\"; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }\n.small { font-size: 12.5px; color: var(--ink-3); }\n\n/* Underline link */\n.ulink {\n color: var(--ink);\n text-decoration: none;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ink);\n padding-bottom: 1px;\n cursor: pointer;\n background: none;\n border-left: 0; border-right: 0; border-top: 0;\n font: inherit;\n}\n.ulink:hover { color: var(--accent); border-bottom-color: var(--accent); }\n\n/* ----- Layout grid ----- */\n.shell {\n max-width: 1440px;\n margin: 0 auto;\n padding: calc(28px * var(--density)) calc(40px * var(--density));\n}\n@media (max-width: 700px) {\n .shell { padding: 20px 18px; }\n}\n\nhr.rule {\n border: 0;\n border-top: 1px solid var(--rule);\n margin: 0;\n}\nhr.rule-soft { border-top-color: var(--rule-soft); }\nhr.rule.thick { border-top-width: 2px; border-top-color: var(--ink); }\n\n/* ----- Top masthead ----- */\n.masthead {\n display: grid;\n grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;\n align-items: end;\n gap: 24px;\n padding-bottom: 14px;\n border-bottom: 3px solid var(--ink);\n position: relative;\n}\n.masthead::after {\n content: \"\";\n position: absolute;\n left: 0; right: 0; bottom: -7px;\n height: 1px; background: var(--ink);\n}\n.masthead .left, .masthead .right {\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 11px;\n letter-spacing: 0.1em;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n color: var(--ink-3);\n}\n.masthead .right { text-align: right; }\n.masthead .title {\n font-family: var(--font-stencil);\n font-weight: 800;\n font-size: clamp(48px, 7vw, 92px);\n line-height: 1.02;\n text-align: center;\n letter-spacing: 0.005em;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n padding-bottom: 8px;\n}\n.masthead .title em {\n font-family: var(--font-display);\n font-style: italic;\n font-weight: 400;\n color: var(--accent);\n text-transform: none;\n letter-spacing: -0.01em;\n font-size: 0.78em;\n margin-right: 6px;\n}\n.masthead .sub {\n text-align: center;\n font-size: 11px;\n letter-spacing: 0.24em;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n color: var(--ink-3);\n margin-top: 14px;\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n}\n\n/* ----- Buttons ----- */\n.btn {\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 12px;\n letter-spacing: 0.1em;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n padding: 10px 16px;\n border: 1px solid var(--ink);\n background: var(--paper);\n color: var(--ink);\n cursor: pointer;\n border-radius: var(--radius);\n transition: background 120ms, color 120ms, transform 120ms;\n}\n.btn:hover { background: var(--ink); color: var(--paper); }\n.btn.primary { background: var(--ink); color: var(--paper); }\n.btn.primary:hover { background: var(--accent); color: var(--accent-ink); border-color: var(--accent); }\n.btn.ghost { border-color: var(--rule); color: var(--ink-2); }\n.btn.ghost:hover { border-color: var(--ink); background: transparent; color: var(--ink); }\n.btn.lg { padding: 14px 22px; font-size: 12.5px; }\n.btn:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }\n\n/* ----- Tag / pill ----- */\n.tag {\n display: inline-flex;\n align-items: center;\n gap: 6px;\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 10.5px;\n letter-spacing: 0.1em;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n color: var(--ink-2);\n border: 1px solid var(--rule);\n padding: 3px 8px;\n border-radius: 100px;\n background: transparent;\n}\n.tag.solid { background: var(--ink); color: var(--paper); border-color: var(--ink); }\n.tag.accent { background: var(--accent); color: var(--accent-ink); border-color: var(--accent); }\n\n/* ----- Index card ----- */\n.card {\n background: var(--paper);\n border: 1px solid var(--rule);\n padding: 22px;\n position: relative;\n border-radius: var(--radius);\n}\n.card.bordered-top { border-top: 2px solid var(--ink); }\n\n/* ----- Decorative archive numerals ----- */\n.archive-num {\n font-family: var(--font-display);\n font-style: italic;\n color: var(--ink-4);\n letter-spacing: -0.04em;\n}\n\n/* ----- Inputs ----- */\n.field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; }\n.field label {\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 10.5px;\n letter-spacing: 0.14em;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n color: var(--ink-3);\n}\n.input {\n font-family: var(--font-display);\n font-size: 56px;\n line-height: 1;\n background: transparent;\n border: 0;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ink);\n color: var(--ink);\n padding: 8px 0;\n outline: none;\n width: 100%;\n font-feature-settings: \"tnum\";\n}\n.input.sm { font-size: 22px; }\n.input:focus { border-bottom-color: var(--accent); }\n.input::placeholder { color: var(--ink-4); font-style: italic; }\n.input-suffix {\n display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 6px;\n}\n.input-suffix .unit { color: var(--ink-3); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; text-transform: uppercase; }\n\n/* Segmented */\n.seg {\n display: inline-flex;\n border: 1px solid var(--ink);\n border-radius: var(--radius);\n overflow: hidden;\n}\n.seg button {\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 11px;\n letter-spacing: 0.1em;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n background: transparent;\n border: 0;\n border-right: 1px solid var(--ink);\n padding: 8px 14px;\n color: var(--ink);\n cursor: pointer;\n}\n.seg button:last-child { border-right: 0; }\n.seg button.on { background: var(--ink); color: var(--paper); }\n\n/* ----- Catalogue card ----- */\n.cat-card {\n display: grid;\n grid-template-columns: 80px 1fr auto;\n align-items: start;\n gap: 22px;\n padding: 24px 0;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);\n cursor: pointer;\n transition: background 150ms, padding 150ms;\n}\n.cat-card:hover { background: var(--paper-2); padding-left: 12px; padding-right: 12px; }\n.cat-card .num {\n font-family: var(--font-display);\n font-style: italic;\n font-size: 38px;\n color: var(--ink-3);\n line-height: 1;\n}\n.cat-card .name {\n font-family: var(--font-display);\n font-size: 30px;\n line-height: 1.1;\n letter-spacing: -0.01em;\n}\n.cat-card .name em { font-style: italic; color: var(--accent); }\n.cat-card .meta { color: var(--ink-3); font-size: 13px; margin-top: 8px; }\n.cat-card .tags { display: flex; gap: 6px; margin-top: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; }\n.cat-card .right {\n text-align: right;\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 11px;\n letter-spacing: 0.1em;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n color: var(--ink-3);\n white-space: nowrap;\n}\n\n@media (max-width: 700px) {\n .cat-card { grid-template-columns: 50px 1fr; gap: 14px; }\n .cat-card .right { grid-column: 1 / -1; text-align: left; }\n .cat-card .name { font-size: 22px; }\n}\n\n/* Grid layout for catalogue */\n.cat-grid {\n display: grid;\n grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr));\n gap: 18px;\n}\n.cat-tile {\n background: var(--paper);\n border: 1px solid var(--rule);\n padding: 20px;\n cursor: pointer;\n position: relative;\n min-height: 240px;\n display: flex;\n flex-direction: column;\n transition: background 150ms, border-color 150ms;\n}\n.cat-tile:hover { border-color: var(--ink); background: var(--paper-2); }\n.cat-tile .num {\n position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 14px;\n font-family: var(--font-display); font-style: italic;\n color: var(--ink-4); font-size: 32px; line-height: 1;\n}\n.cat-tile h3 {\n font-family: var(--font-display);\n font-weight: 400;\n font-size: 26px;\n letter-spacing: -0.01em;\n line-height: 1.12;\n margin: 30px 0 8px;\n}\n.cat-tile h3 em { font-style: italic; color: var(--accent); }\n\n/* ----- Lineage rail ----- */\n.lineage-rail {\n display: grid;\n grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr);\n gap: 0;\n border-top: 1px solid var(--ink);\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ink);\n}\n.lineage-rail .col {\n padding: 14px 14px 16px;\n border-right: 1px solid var(--rule);\n cursor: pointer;\n position: relative;\n}\n.lineage-rail .col:last-child { border-right: 0; }\n.lineage-rail .col.on { background: var(--ink); color: var(--paper); }\n.lineage-rail .col.on .small, .lineage-rail .col.on .eyebrow { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6); }\n.lineage-rail .country {\n font-family: var(--font-display);\n font-size: 22px;\n line-height: 1;\n margin-top: 4px;\n}\n.lineage-rail .col .count {\n position: absolute; right: 10px; top: 10px;\n font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10px; color: var(--ink-3);\n}\n.lineage-rail .col.on .count { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }\n\n@media (max-width: 700px) {\n .lineage-rail { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }\n .lineage-rail .col { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule); }\n}\n\n/* ----- Dossier ----- */\n.dossier-head {\n display: grid;\n grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\n gap: 40px;\n align-items: end;\n padding: 24px 0 28px;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ink);\n}\n.dossier-head h1 {\n font-family: var(--font-display);\n font-weight: 400;\n font-size: clamp(48px, 7vw, 96px);\n line-height: 1.02;\n letter-spacing: -0.02em;\n margin: 0;\n padding-bottom: 8px;\n}\n.dossier-head h1 em { font-style: italic; color: var(--accent); }\n\n.dossier-meta {\n display: grid;\n grid-template-columns: max-content 1fr;\n gap: 6px 24px;\n font-size: 13.5px;\n}\n.dossier-meta dt {\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 10.5px;\n letter-spacing: 0.12em;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n color: var(--ink-3);\n align-self: center;\n}\n.dossier-meta dd { margin: 0; }\n\n@media (max-width: 800px) {\n .dossier-head { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 24px; }\n}\n\n/* ----- Volume / Intensity sparkline ----- */\n.sparkline {\n height: 60px;\n display: grid;\n grid-template-columns: repeat(var(--cols, 8), 1fr);\n gap: 3px;\n align-items: end;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);\n padding-bottom: 8px;\n}\n.sparkline .bar {\n background: var(--ink);\n width: 100%;\n min-height: 2px;\n position: relative;\n}\n.sparkline .bar.faded { background: var(--ink-4); }\n.sparkline .bar.accent { background: var(--accent); }\n\n/* ----- Session table ----- */\n.set-row {\n display: grid;\n grid-template-columns: 36px 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr 36px;\n align-items: center;\n gap: 8px;\n padding: 10px 0;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule-soft);\n}\n.set-row .label {\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 11px;\n letter-spacing: 0.1em;\n color: var(--ink-3);\n text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n.set-row .v {\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-feature-settings: \"tnum\";\n font-size: 16px;\n color: var(--ink);\n background: transparent;\n border: 0;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);\n outline: none;\n padding: 4px 2px;\n width: 100%;\n}\n.set-row .v:focus { border-bottom-color: var(--accent); }\n.set-row.done .v { color: var(--ink-3); }\n.set-row.done { background: var(--paper-2); }\n\n.set-row .check {\n width: 22px; height: 22px;\n border: 1px solid var(--ink);\n border-radius: 100px;\n background: var(--paper);\n cursor: pointer;\n position: relative;\n}\n.set-row .check.on {\n background: var(--ink);\n}\n.set-row .check.on::after {\n content: \"\";\n position: absolute; left: 5px; top: 9px;\n width: 11px; height: 5px;\n border-left: 2px solid var(--paper);\n border-bottom: 2px solid var(--paper);\n transform: rotate(-45deg);\n}\n\n/* ----- Plate diagram ----- */\n.plates {\n display: flex;\n align-items: center;\n gap: 0;\n height: 70px;\n position: relative;\n}\n.plates .bar {\n height: 4px;\n flex: 1;\n background: var(--ink-3);\n position: relative;\n}\n.plates .sleeve {\n height: 14px;\n width: 4px;\n background: var(--ink-3);\n}\n.plates .plate {\n border-radius: 1px;\n margin: 0 1px;\n position: relative;\n}\n.plates .plate-label {\n position: absolute;\n bottom: -16px;\n left: 50%;\n transform: translateX(-50%);\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 9.5px;\n color: var(--ink-3);\n}\n\n/* ----- RPE selector ----- */\n.rpe-pick {\n display: inline-flex;\n gap: 0;\n border: 1px solid var(--rule);\n border-radius: var(--radius);\n overflow: hidden;\n}\n.rpe-pick button {\n width: 28px; height: 26px;\n background: transparent; border: 0; border-right: 1px solid var(--rule);\n color: var(--ink-3);\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 11px;\n cursor: pointer;\n}\n.rpe-pick button:last-child { border-right: 0; }\n.rpe-pick button.on { background: var(--ink); color: var(--paper); }\n\n/* Wizard canvas */\n.wizard {\n min-height: 80vh;\n display: grid;\n grid-template-rows: auto 1fr auto;\n}\n.wizard .stage {\n display: flex;\n flex-direction: column;\n justify-content: center;\n padding: 60px 0;\n}\n.wizard .step-eyebrow {\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 11px;\n letter-spacing: 0.16em;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n color: var(--ink-3);\n margin-bottom: 18px;\n}\n.wizard h2 {\n font-family: var(--font-display);\n font-weight: 400;\n font-size: clamp(36px, 5vw, 60px);\n line-height: 1.08;\n letter-spacing: -0.01em;\n margin: 0 0 8px;\n max-width: 22ch;\n}\n.wizard h2 em { font-style: italic; color: var(--accent); }\n\n.wizard .three-cols {\n display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 36px;\n margin-top: 40px;\n}\n@media (max-width: 700px) {\n .wizard .three-cols { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 22px; }\n .input { font-size: 40px; }\n}\n\n/* progress dots */\n.progress-bar {\n display: flex;\n gap: 4px;\n align-items: center;\n margin-top: 8px;\n}\n.progress-bar .seg-bar {\n height: 2px;\n width: 50px;\n background: var(--ink-4);\n}\n.progress-bar .seg-bar.on { background: var(--ink); }\n\n/* ----- Active session layout ----- */\n.session-grid {\n display: grid;\n grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr;\n gap: 40px;\n margin-top: 32px;\n}\n@media (max-width: 1000px) {\n .session-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n}\n\n.session-side {\n position: sticky;\n top: 24px;\n align-self: start;\n}\n\n/* Lift block */\n.lift-block { padding: 24px 0; border-top: 1px solid var(--ink); }\n.lift-block:first-child { border-top: 0; }\n.lift-block .name {\n display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline;\n font-family: var(--font-display);\n font-size: 36px;\n letter-spacing: -0.01em;\n line-height: 1;\n}\n.lift-block .name em { font-style: italic; }\n.lift-block .name .pct { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; color: var(--ink-3); letter-spacing: 0.1em; }\n\n/* ----- Toast / notice ----- */\n.banner {\n background: var(--paper-2);\n border-left: 3px solid var(--accent);\n padding: 14px 18px;\n font-size: 13.5px;\n color: var(--ink-2);\n}\n\n/* ----- Calendar dots ----- */\n.cal-strip {\n display: grid;\n grid-template-columns: repeat(28, 1fr);\n gap: 4px;\n margin-top: 16px;\n}\n.cal-strip .d {\n aspect-ratio: 1;\n border: 1px solid var(--rule);\n background: transparent;\n cursor: pointer;\n}\n.cal-strip .d.train { background: var(--paper-3); border-color: var(--paper-3); }\n.cal-strip .d.done { background: var(--ink); border-color: var(--ink); }\n.cal-strip .d.today { outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: 1px; }\n\n/* ----- Footer ----- */\n.footer {\n margin-top: 60px;\n padding: 24px 0 36px;\n border-top: 1px solid var(--rule);\n display: flex; justify-content: space-between;\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 10.5px;\n letter-spacing: 0.12em;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n color: var(--ink-3);\n flex-wrap: wrap;\n gap: 12px;\n}\n\n/* ----- Tweak panel button overrides (the starter ships its own styles, just align color) ----- */\n\n/* Drop caps */\n.drop {\n font-family: var(--font-display);\n font-style: italic;\n font-size: 5em;\n float: left;\n line-height: 0.85;\n margin: 6px 12px 0 0;\n color: var(--accent);\n}\n\n/* Two-col article body */\n.article-body {\n column-count: 2;\n column-gap: 36px;\n font-size: 14.5px;\n line-height: 1.55;\n color: var(--ink-2);\n max-width: 80ch;\n}\n.article-body p { margin-top: 0; }\n@media (max-width: 800px) { .article-body { column-count: 1; } }\n\n/* Muted quote */\nblockquote.pull {\n font-family: var(--font-display);\n font-style: italic;\n font-size: 28px;\n line-height: 1.18;\n letter-spacing: -0.005em;\n color: var(--ink);\n border-left: 2px solid var(--accent);\n padding: 6px 0 6px 18px;\n margin: 0;\n}\n\n/* Number scrubbers */\n.scrub-row {\n display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule);\n padding: 10px 0;\n}\n.scrub-row .label {\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase;\n color: var(--ink-3);\n width: 130px;\n flex-shrink: 0;\n}\n.scrub-row .val {\n flex: 1;\n font-family: var(--font-display);\n font-size: 28px;\n color: var(--ink);\n}\n.scrub-row .val .unit {\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 11px;\n color: var(--ink-3);\n letter-spacing: 0.1em;\n margin-left: 4px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n\n/* radio list */\n.radio-list {\n display: grid;\n grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;\n gap: 1px;\n background: var(--rule);\n border: 1px solid var(--rule);\n}\n\n/* ---------- Heavy-iron additions ---------- */\n\n.stencil { font-family: var(--font-stencil); font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.005em; }\n\n.lift-code {\n font-family: var(--font-stencil);\n font-weight: 900;\n font-size: 96px;\n line-height: 0.85;\n letter-spacing: -0.01em;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n color: var(--ink);\n}\n\n.dossier-head h1 {\n font-family: var(--font-stencil);\n font-weight: 800;\n font-size: clamp(56px, 8.5vw, 112px);\n line-height: 0.92;\n letter-spacing: 0.005em;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n margin: 0;\n padding-bottom: 6px;\n}\n.dossier-head h1 em {\n font-family: var(--font-display);\n font-style: italic;\n font-weight: 400;\n color: var(--accent);\n text-transform: none;\n letter-spacing: -0.01em;\n font-size: 0.78em;\n}\n\n.lift-block .name {\n font-family: var(--font-stencil);\n font-weight: 800;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n letter-spacing: 0.005em;\n font-size: 44px;\n}\n.lift-block .name em { font-style: normal; }\n.lift-block .name .pct {\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-weight: 500;\n font-size: 12px;\n color: var(--ink);\n letter-spacing: 0.1em;\n background: var(--ink);\n color: var(--paper);\n padding: 4px 10px;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n\n.cat-card .name { font-family: var(--font-stencil); font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 36px; letter-spacing: 0.005em; line-height: 1.02; }\n.cat-card .name em { font-family: var(--font-display); font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; color: var(--accent); text-transform: none; font-size: 0.72em; letter-spacing: -0.01em; margin-left: 4px; }\n\n.cat-tile h3 { font-family: var(--font-stencil); font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 30px; letter-spacing: 0.005em; line-height: 1.02; }\n.cat-tile h3 em { font-family: var(--font-display); font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; color: var(--accent); text-transform: none; font-size: 0.7em; margin-left: 4px; }\n\n.wizard h2 { font-family: var(--font-stencil); font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: clamp(40px, 5.5vw, 68px); line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0.005em; }\n.wizard h2 em { font-family: var(--font-display); font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; color: var(--accent); text-transform: none; font-size: 0.78em; letter-spacing: -0.01em; }\n\n.lineage-rail .country { font-family: var(--font-stencil); font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 26px; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }\n\n.num-row .cell .n { font-family: var(--font-stencil); font-weight: 800; font-size: 64px; line-height: 0.95; letter-spacing: 0; }\n@media (max-width: 700px) { .num-row .cell .n { font-size: 40px; } }\n\n/* Heavy ruled section */\n.heavy-rule {\n height: 8px;\n background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, var(--ink) 0 16px, transparent 16px 22px);\n margin: 0;\n}\n\n/* Accessory row */\n.acc-list { margin-top: 10px; }\n.acc-row {\n display: grid;\n grid-template-columns: 28px 1fr auto 36px;\n align-items: center;\n gap: 12px;\n padding: 12px 0;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--rule-soft);\n}\n.acc-row .idx { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 11px; color: var(--ink-3); }\n.acc-row .name { font-family: var(--font-stencil); font-weight: 700; font-size: 22px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.01em; line-height: 1; }\n.acc-row .note { font-size: 12.5px; color: var(--ink-3); margin-top: 4px; font-family: var(--font-body); text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0; }\n.acc-row .pres { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 13px; color: var(--ink-2); white-space: nowrap; }\n.acc-row.done { background: var(--paper-2); }\n.acc-row.done .name { color: var(--ink-3); }\n\n.section-head {\n display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: baseline;\n padding: 14px 0 6px;\n border-bottom: 2px solid var(--ink);\n margin-top: 36px;\n}\n.section-head .title {\n font-family: var(--font-stencil);\n font-weight: 800;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n font-size: 22px;\n letter-spacing: 0.02em;\n}\n.section-head .meta {\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 11px;\n color: var(--ink-3);\n letter-spacing: 0.1em;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n\n/* Tonnage hero */\n.hero-tonnage {\n border: 1px solid var(--ink);\n padding: 22px;\n background: var(--paper);\n display: grid;\n grid-template-columns: 1fr;\n gap: 8px;\n}\n.hero-tonnage .label {\n font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.18em;\n text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--ink-3);\n}\n.hero-tonnage .big {\n font-family: var(--font-stencil); font-weight: 900;\n font-size: 88px; line-height: 0.9;\n}\n.hero-tonnage .unit {\n font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 12px; color: var(--ink-3);\n letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase;\n}\n\n.lift-glyph {\n display: inline-block;\n font-family: var(--font-stencil);\n font-weight: 900;\n font-size: 18px;\n line-height: 1;\n background: var(--ink);\n color: var(--paper);\n padding: 5px 8px 4px;\n letter-spacing: 0.04em;\n}\n.lift-glyph.accent { background: var(--accent); }\n.radio-list .ri {\n background: var(--paper);\n padding: 14px;\n cursor: pointer;\n display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px;\n}\n.radio-list .ri.on { background: var(--ink); color: var(--paper); }\n.radio-list .ri .t { font-family: var(--font-display); font-size: 22px; }\n.radio-list .ri.on .t em { color: var(--accent-ink); }\n.radio-list .ri .d { font-size: 12.5px; color: var(--ink-3); }\n.radio-list .ri.on .d { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); }\n\n@media (max-width: 600px) {\n .radio-list { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }\n}\n\n/* Hover blink */\n.fade-in { animation: fade 360ms ease-out both; }\n@keyframes fade { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(4px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: none; } }\n\n/* Heavy rule with marker */\n.marker-rule {\n height: 1px; background: var(--ink); position: relative;\n margin: 14px 0;\n}\n.marker-rule::before {\n content: \"\"; position: absolute; left: 0; top: -3px; width: 7px; height: 7px;\n background: var(--accent); border-radius: 100px;\n}\n\n/* Stamps */\n.stamp {\n display: inline-block;\n border: 2px solid var(--accent);\n color: var(--accent);\n padding: 6px 10px;\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 11px;\n letter-spacing: 0.18em;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n transform: rotate(-4deg);\n border-radius: 2px;\n background: transparent;\n font-weight: 700;\n}\n\n/* Big numerals row */\n.num-row {\n display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);\n gap: 24px;\n border-top: 1px solid var(--ink);\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ink);\n padding: 16px 0;\n}\n.num-row .cell .l {\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 10.5px; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase;\n color: var(--ink-3);\n}\n.num-row .cell .n {\n font-family: var(--font-display);\n font-size: 56px; line-height: 1;\n letter-spacing: -0.01em;\n}\n.num-row .cell .u { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 13px; color: var(--ink-3); margin-left: 6px; }\n\n@media (max-width: 700px) {\n .num-row .cell .n { font-size: 36px; }\n}\n\n/* World map dots, decorative */\n.map-decor {\n height: 220px; width: 100%;\n position: relative;\n overflow: hidden;\n border: 1px solid var(--rule);\n background:\n repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, var(--rule-soft) 0 1px, transparent 1px 18px),\n repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, var(--rule-soft) 0 1px, transparent 1px 18px),\n var(--paper);\n}\n.map-decor .dot {\n position: absolute;\n width: 8px; height: 8px;\n background: var(--accent);\n border-radius: 100px;\n transform: translate(-50%, -50%);\n}\n.map-decor .dot::after {\n content: attr(data-l);\n position: absolute; left: 12px; top: -4px;\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase;\n white-space: nowrap;\n color: var(--ink-2);\n}\n\n/* Tabs */\n.tabs {\n display: flex; gap: 0;\n border-bottom: 1px solid var(--ink);\n}\n.tabs button {\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 11px;\n letter-spacing: 0.12em;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n background: transparent;\n border: 0;\n padding: 12px 18px;\n color: var(--ink-3);\n cursor: pointer;\n border-bottom: 2px solid transparent;\n margin-bottom: -1px;\n}\n.tabs button.on { color: var(--ink); border-bottom-color: var(--ink); }\n\n/* keyboard nav cue */\n.keyhint {\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 10px;\n letter-spacing: 0.1em;\n text-transform: uppercase;\n color: var(--ink-4);\n}\n.kbd {\n display: inline-block;\n padding: 2px 6px;\n border: 1px solid var(--rule);\n border-radius: 3px;\n margin: 0 2px;\n font-family: var(--font-mono);\n font-size: 10px;\n color: var(--ink-2);\n}\n\n/* ----- Print ----- */\n@media print {\n .no-print { display: none !important; }\n body { background: white; color: black; }\n}\n<\u002Fstyle>\n<\u002Fhead>\n<body>\n \n <div id=\"root\"><\u002Fdiv>\n\n <script src=\"e989ef30-1edb-497b-8570-96dfd91f14c6\" integrity=\"sha384-hD6/rw4ppMLGNu3tX5cjIb+uRZ7UkRJ6BPkLpg4hAu/6onKUg4lLsHAs9EBPT82L\" crossorigin=\"anonymous\"><\u002Fscript>\n <script src=\"7b6addec-481c-4c47-bbff-964ec65a52f0\" integrity=\"sha384-u6aeetuaXnQ38mYT8rp6sbXaQe3NL9t+IBXmnYxwkUI2Hw4bsp2Wvmx4yRQF1uAm\" crossorigin=\"anonymous\"><\u002Fscript>\n <script src=\"c32455a1-3d6f-44a6-9bbb-ae246985f01c\" integrity=\"sha384-m08KidiNqLdpJqLq95G/LEi8Qvjl/xUYll3QILypMoQ65QorJ9Lvtp2RXYGBFj1y\" crossorigin=\"anonymous\"><\u002Fscript>\n\n <script type=\"text/babel\" src=\"a5f4a932-5b69-4d17-92c4-7344e019e19f\"><\u002Fscript>\n <script type=\"text/babel\" src=\"b40d7313-2500-43a8-80ef-5eae0a6d3ba4\"><\u002Fscript>\n <script type=\"text/babel\"
